---
title: "NFL Graphs - C"
author: "Chandler"
date: "2024-12-03"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#Load the appropriate libraries:
library(ggplot2)
library(tidymodels)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(kknn)
library(caret)
library(kernlab)
library(nflplotR)
```


```{r run-pass-pred}
svm_data_test %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sens, y = spec)) +
  geom_nfl_logos(aes(team_abbr = team))

```
